pr.title: Record:  Depth Recurrence (layers 4 and 5 repeated): val_bpb 1.1182

output.summary: Dual depth recurrence replays layers 4 and 5 with learnable scalars to emulate 13 virtual layers from 11 real ones while staying under the 16MB budget with the existing TTT/optimizer stack.
techniques: Depth recurrence on layers 4 & 5 via sequential replay with independent block scalars
Tied test-time training layered atop the inherited Muon optimizer + SWA pipeline
Artifact-sized constrained int6+lzma quantization to keep the recurrent model under 16MB
